defi

Umoja Protocol

 

Umoja Protocol is an asset management protocol looking to automate money itself. Our vision is to democratize wealth creation for the first time in history by introducing DeFi’s first ‘smartcoins.'

Imagine a tool that allows you to automate gains and minimize losses just buy buying a token? This is a world where your money actually works for you.

 

Features

 

Umoja provides two offerings, "Synths" and "Smartcoins."

 

Synths are tokenized trading strategies, each built for a specific asset management objective. Retail investors may use them directly & incorporate them into their own strategies or they can be used to create new assets altogether.

 

Smartcoins are AI-based digital assets that automatically optimize gains and protect against losses. Now you don't have to become a OG degen or pro-trader. All you do is HODL.

 

Umoja is set to create the lowest risk, highest yielding tokens in crypto with the introduction of smartcoins in an asset management market set to have a $5.4 trillion market cap by 2030 alone. Where most DeFi protocols are too difficult to use, all you need to do to use Umoja is HODL.

 

Tier 1 Team

 

Umoja's team boasts alumni from Goldman Sachs, ConsenSys, Google, Mastercard, RBS, Credit Suisse, Valora, and Celo who have a minumum of 10yrs in digital marketing, TradFi, Crypto, and engineering experience each. Umoja's Founder, Robby Greenfield, is a Goldman Sachs alum. and Fmr Head of Impact at ConsenSys.

 

Backed by the Best

 

Coinbase Ventures, Blockchain Founders Fund, 500 Global, Norrsken, Avalanche Blizzard Fund, QuantStamp, Orange DAO, 3Commas, Selini Capital amongst others.

Launch Project

Ignition is PAID Network’s IDO Launchpad where our mission is to connect highly vetted founders with brilliant ideas for curated projects and offerings with crowd-sourced funding and best-in-class incubation tools and advisors to bring the vision of founders and creators to fruition for the benefit of all.
